actionEn: The ABS indicator should light briefly at engine start and then go out; if it stays on, get it checked — stopping distance may increase.
descriptionEn: A steadily lit indicator means a fault in the ABS system.

actionEn: A fault in the battery charging system — stop as soon as possible and check the electrical system, otherwise the engine may stall.
descriptionEn: Means there is a problem in the battery charging system.

actionEn: A serious brake system fault — stop immediately in a safe place, check the brake fluid and system, drive with extreme caution.
descriptionEn: A serious brake system fault — must be checked immediately.

actionEn: The parking (hand) brake is engaged, or brake fluid is low — release the brake; if the light stays on, do not drive.
descriptionEn: Means the parking brake is still engaged.

actionEn: Low brake fluid level — check and top up immediately, braking effectiveness may be reduced.
descriptionEn: Brake fluid needs to be checked and topped up.

actionEn: A turn signal indicator is lit — signals a turn, check it turns off after the manoeuvre.
descriptionEn: Means the left or right turn signal is on.

actionEn: Hazard lights are on — warns other drivers of a danger, turn off if not needed.
descriptionEn: Means all turn signals are flashing simultaneously (hazard warning).

actionEn: High beams are on — switch to low beam when oncoming traffic appears.
descriptionEn: Means the high-beam headlights are on.

actionEn: Front fog lights are on — use only in poor visibility, then turn off.
descriptionEn: Means the front fog lights are on.

actionEn: The rear fog light is on — use only in heavy fog or rain, overuse dazzles drivers behind you.
descriptionEn: Means the rear fog lights are on.

actionEn: The driver's or passenger's seatbelt is not fastened — fasten it before driving.
descriptionEn: Means the driver or passenger has not fastened their seatbelt.

actionEn: The cruise control (speed-holding) system is active — monitor the set speed.
descriptionEn: Means the cruise control (constant speed) system is on.

actionEn: A general fault in the electrical system — get it checked, other indicators may not work correctly.
descriptionEn: Means there is a general fault in the vehicle's electrical system.

actionEn: The immobiliser (anti-theft) system is active or faulty — if the key isn't recognised, use the correct key/card.
descriptionEn: Means the anti-theft immobiliser system is active or faulty.
